sprite.name: ${name}
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${color_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${color_selected}) : (btn_hovered ? color(${color_hovered}) : color(${color_default}) ) ) }

sprite.name: ${name}
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${color_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${color_selected}) : (btn_hovered ? color(${color_hovered}) : color(${color_default}) ) ) }

sprite.name: background
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${backcolor_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${backcolor_selected}) : (btn_hovered ? color(${backcolor_hovered}) : color(${backcolor_default}) ) ) }

sprite.name: background
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${bg_color_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${bg_color_selected}) : (btn_hovered ? color(${bg_color_hovered}) : color(${bg_color_default}) ) ) }

label.name: label
label.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${font_color_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${font_color_selected}) : ( btn_hovered ? color(${font_color_hovered}) : color(${font_color_default}) ) ) }

sprite.name: background
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${bg_color_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${bg_color_selected}) : (btn_hovered ? color(${bg_color_hovered}) : color(${bg_color_default}) ) ) }

label.name: label
label.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(${font_color_disabled}) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(${font_color_selected}) : ( btn_hovered ? color(${font_color_hovered}) : color(${font_color_default}) ) ) }

button.name: back
button.visible: {# show_buttons and !(hascontrollershortcuts and is_controller_input and (!${gamepad_shortcuts_hoveronly} or cbx_is_hovered) ) }

gamepad_icon.name: gamepadIconBack
gamepad_icon.visible: {# show_buttons and (hascontrollershortcuts and is_controller_input and (!${gamepad_shortcuts_hoveronly} or cbx_is_hovered) ) }

button.name: forward
button.visible: {# show_buttons and !(hascontrollershortcuts and is_controller_input and (!${gamepad_shortcuts_hoveronly} or cbx_is_hovered) ) }

gamepad_icon.name: gamepadIconForward
gamepad_icon.visible: {# show_buttons and (hascontrollershortcuts and is_controller_input and (!${gamepad_shortcuts_hoveronly} or cbx_is_hovered) ) }
